summary: SearchCoins / SearchBanknotes FTS predicate uses bare-table form `resources_fts MATCH ?` instead of the invalid `f.resources_fts MATCH ?`.
reason: FTS5 MATCH targets the FTS table, not `<alias>.<vtable>`. The original `f.resources_fts MATCH ?` raised `no such column: f.resources_fts` at runtime, breaking every `search --text <query>` invocation. Aligned with the existing Search method at store.go:~661. Greptile P1 finding on PR #630 (review 4).
validated_outcome: go build ./... && go vet ./...; live smoke `search --text morgan --json` returns empty (correct for empty cache)
